root: ^Noelle: Hiya Mr. Fisherman! I'm Noelle! Whatcha got there?

school_reply: ^Sam: Aren't you supposed to be in school right now?
^Noelle: But class is suuuch a drag these days!
^Noelle: Coming down to the sea and watching all the animals is so much cooler!
fishing_advance: ^Sam: You like to fish here too? I was just on my way back from my catch.
^Noelle: I don't know how to fish... someday I'd like to learn, though.
^Noelle: If you ever have tips or catch something cool, show me! I come here all the time!
